reason: Successfully navigated to the application, selected the target agent, sent a math question, and verified the agent responded with the correct answer "4" within 10 seconds.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents (QA-20260410-175832-t1j4, QA-20260410-175830-wmli, and QA-20260410-175829-v4q5)
Found "QA-20260410-175829-v4q5" agent in the sidebar and clicked it - Agent detail page opened, showing the landing page for a new session
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status confirmed as "idle" in the header
Clicked on message input field and typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message successfully entered in the input field
Clicked the send button to submit the message - Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", and a new session was created titled "Basic Math Question With QA Agent"
Waited for agent response - Agent responded within 10 seconds (well under the 3-minute limit), status changed back to "idle"
Verified response contains "4" - Agent correctly responded with "4" and displayed "Worked for 10s" timestamp
